title: sideroxylon floribundum subsp. belizense
intro: Sideroxylon floribundum subsp. belizense, also known as the Belizean buttonwood or Belizean sidewood, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sideroxylon floribundum subsp. belizense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
